description: Style NoteWith a minimalistic and simple design, this black wallet by peter england speaks for itself. Using pure leather, this wallet does more than just store your money and credit cards - its sleek design adds a heightened vibe of sophistication.Product DetailsBlack leather wallet with two main compartments, has two card holders, two slip pockets, one coin holder and embossed branding on the frontMaterial and Care100% LeatherWipe surface with dry clean cloth to avoid dust and stainsDo not store in direct sunlightSizeHeight: 9 cm Width: 11 cm
